subtitles.original: 3D新衣装お披露目 / 超重大発表 / 告知あり
subtitles.english: [3D New Outfit Reveal / Super Important Announcement / Announcement Included]

subtitles.original: GUEST 01: AZKi / GUEST 02: 猫又おかゆ
subtitles.english: GUEST 01: AZKi / GUEST 02: Nekomata Okayu

subtitles.original: GUEST 03: 常闇トワ / GUEST 04: 森カリオペ
subtitles.english: GUEST 03: Tokoyami Towa / GUEST 04: Mori Calliope

subtitles.original: GUEST 05: ハコス・ベールズ / GUEST 06: IRyS
subtitles.english: GUEST 05: Hakos Baelz / GUEST 06: IRyS

subtitles.original: GUEST 07: ラプラス・ダークネス / GUEST 08: 博衣こより
subtitles.english: GUEST 07: Laplus Darknesss / GUEST 08: Hakui Koyori

subtitles.original: GUEST 09: 尾丸ポルカ / GUEST 10: 虎金妃笑虎
subtitles.english: GUEST 09: Omaru Polka / GUEST 10: Kogane Mikoto

subtitles.original: GUEST 11: フワワ・アビスガード / GUEST 12: モココ・アビスガード
subtitles.english: GUEST 11: Fuwawa Abyssgard / GUEST 12: Mococo Abyssgard

subtitles.original: GUEST 13: 輪堂千代 / GUEST 14: 風真いろは
subtitles.english: GUEST 13: Rinndo Chiyo / GUEST 14: Kazama Iroha

subtitles.original: 走りなさい 早く もっと 早く
subtitles.english: Run, run, faster, even faster,

subtitles.original: 哀しみに 追いつかれないように
subtitles.english: so you don't get caught by sorrow.

subtitles.original: 探しなさい 明かりの灯る道を
subtitles.english: Search, search for the path where the light shines,

subtitles.original: それは それは 眩いでしょう
subtitles.english: it must be, it must be dazzling.

subtitles.original: 挑みなさい 君の美しさや 尊さを
subtitles.english: Challenge, challenge...

subtitles.original: 傷つけるモノに
subtitles.english: ...the things that hurt your beauty and preciousness.

subtitles.original: 眠りなさい 疲れたら 眠りなさい
subtitles.english: Sleep, sleep when you get tired,

subtitles.original: 神話を持たない あの星座のように
subtitles.english: like that constellation that has no myth.

subtitles.original: 手を離した後 君は気づくだろう
subtitles.english: After letting go of your hand, you'll probably notice,

subtitles.original: 指の形 体温
subtitles.english: the shape of your fingers, the warmth.

subtitles.original: その名残が 胸を刺す
subtitles.english: That lingering memory stabs my chest.

subtitles.original: 忘れたことも 忘れてしまえ
subtitles.english: Forget what you've forgotten,

subtitles.original: 哀しみも 温もりも 消えてしまえ
subtitles.english: let the sorrow and warmth disappear too.

subtitles.original: されど今も 耳に残るは
subtitles.english: Yet, what still remains in my ears even now...
